name: psql
description: PostgreSQL interactive terminal — query and manage PostgreSQL databases

globalOptions.name: --command
globalOptions.description: Execute a single command and exit

globalOptions.name: --echo-all
globalOptions.description: Print all input lines as read

detectors.name: databases
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c 'SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datistemplate = false ORDER BY datname;' 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: schemas
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c "SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name NOT IN ('pg_catalog','information_schema','pg_toast') ORDER BY schema_name;" 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: tables
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY tablename;" 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: active_connections
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c "SELECT datname, usename, state, count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity GROUP BY datname, usename, state ORDER BY count(*) DESC;" 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: db_sizes
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c "SELECT datname, pg_size_pretty(pg_database_size(datname)) FROM pg_database WHERE datistemplate = false ORDER BY pg_database_size(datname) DESC;" 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: extensions
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c 'SELECT extname, extversion FROM pg_extension ORDER BY extname;' 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: roles
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c 'SELECT rolname FROM pg_roles WHERE rolcanlogin = true ORDER BY rolname;' 2>/dev/null

detectors.name: running_queries
detectors.command: psql -U postgres -t -A -c "SELECT pid, now() - pg_stat_activity.query_start AS duration, query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid() ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>/dev/null
